prompt: Jeg trenger funksjonalitet for prosjekter og oppgavehåndtering. Jeg må kunne dele det jeg ønsker til andre og ha en enkel måte å få oversikt over hvor prosjektet er nå og hva som er utestående

candidates.title: Current status and outstanding work
candidates.summary: Show where a project stands now and what remains outstanding.
candidates.goalOutcome: The user can see current project position and outstanding work in one overview.

candidates.title: Project work overview and sharing
candidates.summary: Manage projects, tasks, sharing, and current outstanding work.
candidates.goalOutcome: A user can share desired project intent and see current status plus outstanding work.

candidates.title: Share selected project intent
candidates.summary: Prepare, deliver, and open a selected project/work snapshot for a recipient.
candidates.goalOutcome: A selected idea/work snapshot can be prepared, delivered, and opened by an admitted recipient.

candidates.title: Privacy-preserving event networking
candidates.summary: Help people meet others at an event while limiting profile visibility and private data exposure.
candidates.goalOutcome: The user can network with consent controls and without exposing more profile data than intended.

prompt: Lag en enkel prosjektoversikt med oppgaver, blokkerte ting og hvem som venter på hva.

candidates.title: Project work overview and sharing
candidates.summary: Manage projects, tasks, sharing, and current outstanding work.
candidates.goalOutcome: A user can share desired project intent and see current status plus outstanding work.

candidates.title: Project portfolio
candidates.summary: Track project status, health, priorities, milestones, releases, and capacity.
candidates.goalOutcome: Project status, health, priority, and milestone/release state can be read and counted.

candidates.title: Work items
candidates.summary: Track tasks, bugs, decisions, comments, subtasks, relations, and blockers.
candidates.goalOutcome: Open, blocked, in-progress, and done work can be tracked with relations and supporting evidence.

candidates.title: Questionnaire access audit
candidates.summary: Keep questionnaire responses consent-gated and transport payloads minimal.
candidates.goalOutcome: Admin visibility follows consent and invitation transport does not leak questionnaire content.

candidates.title: Hallucination evaluation gate
candidates.summary: Periodically test that chat, purpose decomposition, model-assisted proposals, and source-backed answers do not invent facts, refs, capabilities, or unsupported certainty.
candidates.goalOutcome: HAVEN can periodically pass a hallucination evaluation suite and report regressions before hallucinated claims become accepted knowledge or user-facing behavior.

candidates.title: Event schedule change request
candidates.summary: Propose a schedule change for an event item while requiring role checks and confirmation.
candidates.goalOutcome: A schedule change is proposed or queued for approval without silently changing the event program.

candidates.title: Respondent questionnaire form
candidates.summary: Expose consent, questions, draft save, submit, and withdrawal paths for a respondent.
candidates.goalOutcome: Respondent can answer and submit only after consent.

candidates.title: Event agenda recommendation
candidates.summary: Recommend or open an agenda item based on current time, interests, constraints, and available event context.
candidates.goalOutcome: The user gets a relevant agenda recommendation or a clear missing-context response.

prompt: Skriv til henne at jeg gjerne tar en kaffe etterpå.

candidates.title: Contact follow-up
candidates.summary: Continue an existing contact or meeting thread with explicit recipient and message context.
candidates.goalOutcome: A follow-up message can be drafted for the correct recipient without auto-sending.

candidates.title: Event meeting draft request
candidates.summary: Draft an event meeting request or introduction while requiring explicit user action before sending.
candidates.goalOutcome: A relevant meeting or coffee request is drafted for the right person and never silently sent.

prompt: Finn kontakter med purpose://contact.introduction og la meg sende en oppfølging etter godkjenning.

candidates.title: Contact introduction
candidates.summary: Introduce or connect people through a purpose-bound contact request.
candidates.goalOutcome: A contact introduction is prepared or delivered without leaking private contact information.

candidates.summary: Continue an existing contact or meeting thread with explicit recipient and message context.
candidates.goalOutcome: A follow-up message can be drafted for the correct recipient without auto-sending.

candidates.title: Contact and communication
candidates.summary: Help people initiate, continue, or refuse contact with explicit purpose and privacy boundaries.
candidates.goalOutcome: A person can communicate or be introduced without exposing private contact data outside consent and grants.

candidates.summary: Prepare, deliver, and open a selected project/work snapshot for a recipient.
candidates.goalOutcome: A selected idea/work snapshot can be prepared, delivered, and opened by an admitted recipient.

candidates.title: Privacy-preserving event networking
candidates.summary: Help people meet others at an event while limiting profile visibility and private data exposure.
candidates.goalOutcome: The user can network with consent controls and without exposing more profile data than intended.

prompt: Vi bør spore bidrag og returnere verdi uten å gjøre folk til en opaque score.

candidates.title: Value and commons
candidates.summary: Purposes for returning value, protecting commons, and avoiding extractive platform dynamics.
candidates.goalOutcome: Value flows are transparent, bounded by policy, and do not undermine equal human worth or owner agency.

candidates.title: Complete questionnaire campaign
candidates.summary: Create, deliver, answer, inspect, and analyze a questionnaire campaign.

prompt: Sjekk offisielle kilder, URL, domene og dato før vi bruker påstanden.

candidates.title: Current methodology sources
candidates.summary: Use source evidence with checked dates and stale-source policy.
candidates.goalOutcome: Claims about outside practice, law, standards, or model/runtime behavior are based on source records that can be rechecked.

candidates.title: Complete questionnaire campaign
candidates.summary: Create, deliver, answer, inspect, and analyze a questionnaire campaign.
candidates.goalOutcome: A user can create, deliver, answer, inspect, and analyze a consent-gated questionnaire.

candidates.title: Owner entity access affordance
candidates.summary: Ensure every production skeleton leaves the owner a visible route back to their own entity, Co-Pilot, or equivalent recovery interface.
candidates.goalOutcome: A generated or user-authored skeleton cannot lock the owner out of their entity context.

candidates.title: Knowledge and methodology
candidates.summary: Purposes that provide source evidence, freshness, methods, and reusable knowledge for decisions.
candidates.goalOutcome: HAVEN decisions can cite current internal state, stable local knowledge, and checked external sources when needed.

prompt: Bygg en full ERP for lager, faktura og lønnskjøring.
Lag et bookingsystem for restaurantbord med skiftplan og kassaintegrasjon.
Jeg trenger både prosjektstatus og et spørreskjema til teamet om hva som blokkerer dem.

candidates.title: Project work overview and sharing
candidates.summary: Manage projects, tasks, sharing, and current outstanding work.
candidates.goalOutcome: A user can share desired project intent and see current status plus outstanding work.

candidates.title: Complete questionnaire campaign
candidates.summary: Create, deliver, answer, inspect, and analyze a questionnaire campaign.
candidates.goalOutcome: A user can create, deliver, answer, inspect, and analyze a consent-gated questionnaire.

candidates.title: Explain policy or rules
candidates.summary: Explain rules, policy, or consent boundaries in plain language without inventing authority.
candidates.goalOutcome: The user receives a clear explanation of the relevant rule and what actions are allowed, blocked, or require consent.

candidates.title: Capture and place new purposes
candidates.summary: Detect new purpose candidates, find their nearest ancestor, and queue review when automatic placement is uncertain or consent is required.
candidates.goalOutcome: New purpose candidates are captured, deduplicated, placed under the nearest known ancestor, and escalated only when needed.

candidates.summary: Expose consent, questions, draft save, submit, and withdrawal paths for a respondent.
candidates.goalOutcome: Respondent can answer and submit only after consent.

prompt: Lag en pen adminflate med eksport, men sørg for tilgang, samtykke og audit.

candidates.title: Functional accessible GUI
candidates.summary: Ensure controls are labeled, focusable, visually stable, aesthetic, and wired to real actions.
candidates.goalOutcome: All visible controls work, text and fields do not overlap, and keyboard/focus behavior is usable.

candidates.title: Access, audit and privacy
candidates.summary: Keep visibility grant-bound and mutations auditable.
candidates.goalOutcome: Reads, writes, shares, and exports follow explicit grants and leave reviewable evidence.

candidates.title: Questionnaire access audit
candidates.summary: Keep questionnaire responses consent-gated and transport payloads minimal.
candidates.goalOutcome: Admin visibility follows consent and invitation transport does not leak questionnaire content.

prompt: Bruk den synlige prosjektcellen til å vise status og utestående arbeid.

candidates.title: Project work overview and sharing
candidates.summary: Manage projects, tasks, sharing, and current outstanding work.
candidates.goalOutcome: A user can share desired project intent and see current status plus outstanding work.

candidates.title: Digital work
candidates.summary: Purposes that help people or scaffolds coordinate, collect, share, inspect, and improve digital work.
candidates.goalOutcome: Digital work surfaces make useful work easier without hiding state, purpose, or access boundaries.

candidates.title: Current status and outstanding work
candidates.summary: Show where a project stands now and what remains outstanding.
candidates.goalOutcome: The user can see current project position and outstanding work in one overview.

prompt: Bruk spørreskjemacellen til å sette opp, sende og analysere svar.

candidates.title: Analyze questionnaire responses
candidates.summary: Inspect counts and export response data transparently.
candidates.goalOutcome: Admin can read, export, and analyze response data according to consent and grants.

candidates.title: Questionnaire admin authoring
candidates.summary: Configure title, context, consent, questions, pages, and lifecycle.
candidates.goalOutcome: Admin can configure a campaign without editing code.
